Name: WormEatenPlanet
Notes: A set of three giant apples with a burrowing green worm connecting them. The worm's movement is divided into three stages; the first one being controlled by a cutscene and the other two being controlled by switches.

Point_arg0.Name: Point Behavior
Point_arg0.Description: Behavior of the worm on this point.

Values.Notes: The worm enters an apple at this point
The worm comes to rest at this point, waiting for the next movement
The worm leaves an apple at this point

SW_A.Description: Starts the second movement of the worm.

SW_B.Description: Starts the third movement of the worm.

Rail.Description: The path for the worm to move on.

DemoCast.Description: Can take part in a cutscene. Its special cutscene nerve starts the first movement of the worm.
